Gothic knight in black obsidian plate armor with crimson trim, holding a zweihander dripping with blood.
Heretical cardinal draped in torn crimson vestments, bound by rosary chains, eyes glowing with forbidden knowledge.
Cloaked wanderer wearing a cracked silver mask, carrying a wrought-iron lantern that flickers with green flame.
Vampire lord in midnight Victorian tailcoat with ivory cravat, pale fingers adorned with ancestral rings.
Blood-magic warlock in charcoal robes, forearms covered in glowing crimson runes, clutching a bone staff.
Monster-slayer in Taisho-gothic long coat, bandolier of silver stakes, wielding twin blessed daggers.
Death-priest in skeletal porcelain mask, flowing black vestments, gripping a silver scythe etched with prayers.
Ghost-bride in shredded wedding gown stained with dried blood, clutching withered bouquet, veil torn and floating.
Hunched crone-witch with ancient raven perched on shoulder, gnarled fingers stirring cauldron of bone broth.
Candlelit scholar bent over forbidden grimoire, ink-stained fingers, shadows dancing across gaunt face.
Ruined paladin in tarnished silver armor overgrown with thorny vines, shattered holy symbol hanging from neck.
Cursed priest kneeling at crumbling altar, black cassock torn open, clutching bloodstained bible with trembling hands.
Traveling occultist in weathered cloak carrying brass lantern, face hidden beneath wide-brimmed shadow-casting hat.
Cursed duchess in black lace mourning gown with cobweb veil, holding wilted roses, eyes hollow and distant.
Robed warlock with crystalline staff pulsing violet light, arcane symbols carved into exposed skeletal hands.
Silver-cross hunter in leather duster wielding heavy crossbow, belts lined with wooden stakes and holy water.
Robed reaper with ornate silver scythe, face concealed by flowing black hood, trailing spectral mist.
Cursed countess in widow's veil and funeral dress, pale throat bearing fang marks, clutching cameo locket.
Young vampire noble with pearl choker and ruffled collar, crimson lips parted revealing elongated fangs.
Hedge-sorceress with gnarled staff and glass potion vials, moss-covered cloak, speaking to skeletal familiars.
Cloaked mourner kneeling at stone crypt entrance, face obscured, single white lily clutched in black-gloved hands.
Whip-wielding vampire hunter in brown leather coat, silver crucifix pendant, coiled blessed chain across shoulders.
White-lace holy knight in silver gauntlets and pale armor, golden rosary wrapped around sword hilt.
Exiled prince in shadow-forged armor with tattered royal cape, crown cracked and eyes burning with vengeful sorrow.
Old librarian hunched over ancient tome, brass spectacles reflecting candlelight, fingers tracing Latin inscriptions.
Young witch in black lace dress with obsidian tiara, black cat familiar coiled at feet, moonstone ring glowing.
Masquerade noble in golden filigree mask and velvet doublet, concealing dagger beneath embroidered cloak.
Ghost-armor knight with empty helm and flickering blue blade, transparent plate revealing nothing but void within.
Crimson-gown vampire queen wearing jeweled blood-ruby crown, elongated nails like talons, throne of bones behind.
Cloaked necromancer raising skeletal hand over open grave, obsidian staff topped with human skull wreathed in fog.
Leather-clad werewolf hunter with silver-bladed axe, lupine fang necklace, scarred face illuminated by full moon's glow.
Victorian assassin in charcoal tailcoat clutching ornate dagger, face half-hidden by crimson silk scarf and top hat.
Plague-doctor in black leather coat and beaked bird-mask, carrying ivory-handled cane and vial-filled medical satchel.
Poison-witch in lace apron over midnight dress, shelves of labeled venom bottles, mortar grinding nightshade petals.
Fallen angel with tattered black wings and stained white robes, tarnished halo floating crooked above bowed head.
Fanged lord in frilled burgundy shirt and velvet waistcoat, pearl cufflinks gleaming, crimson wine glass in hand.
Black-veiled widow holding single blood-red rose at graveside, obsidian mourning jewelry catching dim lantern light.
Young Van Helsing archetype in hunter's vest with crossbow slung, holy water vials strapped across weathered boots.
Death-mage in tattered robes summoning spirits, human skull staff glowing green, surrounded by floating bone fragments.
Carnival figure in harlequin porcelain mask and Renaissance doublet, blood-splattered ruffles, holding ceremonial rapier dripping crimson.
Cursed knight in rust-eaten chainmail draped with funeral shroud, sword embedded with shattered saint's bones.
Blind priest in ash-gray robes clutching melted candelabra, eyes sewn shut with silver thread.
Hooded pilgrim with iron-spiked staff and tattered map, face wrapped in blood-stained linen bandages.
Aristocratic vampiress in emerald velvet gown with bat-wing collar, holding obsidian hand-mirror reflecting nothing.
Storm-witch in indigo robes crackling with lightning, skeletal hands raised, eyes replaced by swirling tempests.
Beast-hunter in wolf-pelt mantle wielding serrated silver machete, face scarred by claw marks.
Bone-reaper draped in vertebrae necklaces and femur charms, carrying rusted sickle etched with death prayers.
Phantom bride in ice-blue gown frozen mid-dance, frost coating skeletal fingers still clutching phantom groom.
Gutter-witch hunched over rat-bone dice, patched cloak stitched from burial shrouds, cackling toothless grin.
Exorcist scholar in soot-stained cassock holding burning censer, Latin scripture tattooed across shaved scalp.
